protocol_notes: VAG post-2008 uses UDS service 0x22 (ReadDataByIdentifier). Engine ECU CAN address 0x7E0, response 0x7E8. Transmission 0x7E1/0x7E9.
sources: VWVortex — boost mbar absolute confirmed (subtract ~1013 for gauge)
confidence_notes: Formulas marked HIGH are cross-verified by multiple community sources. MEDIUM have single source. LOW are inferred from measuring block equivalents and need hardware verification.

0xF110.label: VIN
0xF110.notes: Standardized UDS identifier, works on all manufacturers

0xF189.label: ECU software version
0xF189.notes: Used as cache key in Hudson ECU cache

0xF40B.label: Boost pressure (actual)
0xF40B.notes: Absolute pressure — subtract atmospheric (~1013 mbar) for gauge pressure. Max ~2540 mbar (22.3 psi gauge). Source: VWVortex boost threads, Ross-Tech measuring block 115 equivalent.

0xF40C.label: Boost pressure (specified/requested)
0xF40C.notes: Target boost from ECU map. Compare with 0xF40B for wastegate/turbo health. Source: Ross-Tech measuring block 115-3/115-4 equivalent.

0xF404.label: MAF (actual)
0xF404.notes: At idle should be ~370 mg/stroke (TDI). At 3000 RPM WOT should be 850-900 mg/stroke for healthy TDI. Source: Ross-Tech TDI page group 003, TDIClub.

0xF405.label: MAF (specified)
0xF405.notes: ECU target MAF. Compare with 0xF404 — large deviation indicates MAF sensor issue or intake leak.

0xF406.label: Fuel trim (additive, idle)
0xF406.notes: Should be between -10% and +10%. Above +25% usually indicates bad MAF or intake leak. Source: Ross-Tech measuring block 032 field 1 equivalent.

0xF407.label: Fuel trim (multiplicative, part load)
0xF407.notes: Should be between -10% and +10%. Source: Ross-Tech measuring block 032 field 2 equivalent.

0xF40D.label: Exhaust gas temperature (EGT)
0xF40D.notes: Formula inferred from common VAG temperature scaling. Needs hardware verification. Not available on all engines.

0xF408.label: Oil temperature
0xF408.notes: Formula inferred. Not exposed on all ECU variants. Needs verification.

0xF40E.label: Injection quantity (actual)
0xF40E.notes: Diesel only. Actual fuel injected per stroke.

0xF40F.label: Injection quantity (specified)
0xF40F.notes: Diesel only. ECU target injection quantity.

0xF401.label: Engine speed (RPM)
0xF401.notes: UDS equivalent of mode 01 PID 0C. Formula same as OBD2 standard.

0xF403.label: Coolant temperature
0xF403.notes: Standard offset formula, same as OBD2 mode 01 PID 05.

0xF600.label: Transmission fluid temperature
0xF600.notes: Range varies by identifier. Needs verification on specific DSG/auto variants.
